skill.core.learning.description.advanced:
{Advanced Learning}

Increases hero's earned experience by 50%. Can learn any spell up to 4th level used in combat
skill.core.learning.description.basic:
{Basic Learning}

Increases hero's earned experience by 25%. Can learn any spell up to 3rd level used in combat
skill.core.learning.description.expert:
{Expert Learning}

Increases hero's earned experience by 75%. Can learn any spell up to 5th level used in combat
